vector_metrics.basis: S_t reprojected from MODEL_WEIGHTS (fatigue+tactical+psychology); L_t mu_bias from DC-lambda residuals, sigma_chaos from weather+referee

scenarios.label: Base case
scenarios.note: The most likely flow — CAI's consensus across form, tactics and momentum.

scenarios.label: Upside · Colombia click
scenarios.note: Colombia's current form holds and they convert their chances — the tie opens up and they pull clear.

scenarios.label: Downside · Switzerland frustrates
scenarios.note: A flat, low-margin night — Switzerland sit in and the tie tightens, live to swing on extra time or penalties.

Switzerland: Blunter in the final third — fewer clear chances created.
Colombia: No glaring weakness — a balanced side on current form.

match_flow.text: Attacking substitutions as both benches go for it
Level at full time 1-1 — into extra time
Fatigue tells — Colombia find a winner in extra time

turning_points: Level at full time 1-1 — into extra time
Fatigue tells — Colombia find a winner in extra time
risk_factors: Model confidence is modest (48/100) — wide outcome spread.

reasons: Colombia carries the sharper attack (3.28 vs 1.34 xG/match).
Colombia grades higher on form & big-match composure (37% vs 30%).
Edge from the spot: Colombia convert ~78% vs Switzerland ~74% — decisive if it goes to pens.
Current form favours Colombia — group record 3W-1D-0L (+10 Elo) vs Switzerland 3W-1D-0L (+18).
explainability.why_penalties: A shootout is unlikely (11%) — one side should settle it inside 120'.
explainability.what_could_change: An early goal swings momentum; an injury to Colombia's key creator, or Switzerland stealing a set-piece, flips it.

disclaimer: This platform is an AI-driven probability simulation built for entertainment and analytics purposes. Not betting advice.
